subcodes.first_line: The book thou didst address to this Wronged One hath reached Us, and We have hearkened unto that which thou didst call out unto God, the Lord of all worlds. We answer thee through this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتابک و سمعنا ما نادیت به الله رب العالمین اجبناک بلوح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
